html:
Exclusive to:

Jelly Salad is a Crock Pot Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is cooked by combining 2 Leafy Meat and a Sweetener value of at least 2.0. It takes 40 seconds to cook. It counts as a Meat item so Wigfrid will eat it, but Wurt will not.

Recipe

×2

×2

Examples

×2

×2

×2

×3

Tips

  • This is a great food for Wigfrid players, since it restores a large amount of Sanity, and Wigfrid cannot eat Cooked Green Caps.
  • If the player has developed a Leafy Meat farm through the use of Meat Bulb (Lureplant) on a boat and has access to Bee farms, the player can consistently restore their sanity easily.
  • The player can use Mushroom Planters to farm Green Caps or Glommer for its goop, which, when eaten, will drop the player's sanity by 50 points at once. Combined with the 50 sanity gain from eating Jelly Salad, this allows the player to quickly manipulate their sanity at will, for example when going to the Lunar Island.

Trivia

  • Jelly Salad was introduced in the Troubled Waters update.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

'''Jelly Salad''' is a [[Crock Pot]] [[Food]] [[Items|Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]],'' introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is cooked by combining 2 [[Leafy Meat]] and a [[Sweetener]] value of at least 2.0. It takes 40 seconds to cook.  It counts as a [[Meat]] item so [[Wigfrid]] will eat it, but [[Wurt]] will not.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Leafy Meats
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Sweetener
|count2 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Jelly Salad
}}

== {{pic|32|Crock Pot}} Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Leafy Meats
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Honey
|count2 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Jelly Salad
}}
{{Recipe

|count1 = 2
|item2 = Royal Jelly
|item3 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Jelly Salad
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Leafy Meats
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Royal Jelly
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Jelly Salad
}}
{{clear}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* This is a great food for [[Wigfrid]] players, since it restores a large amount of [[Sanity]], and Wigfrid cannot eat [[Cooked Green Cap]]s.
*If the player has developed a Leafy Meat farm through the use of [[Meat Bulb (Lureplant)]] on a boat and has access to Bee farms, the player can consistently restore their sanity easily.
*The player can use [[Mushroom Planter|Mushroom Planters]] to farm [[Green Cap|Green Caps]] or [[Glommer]] for its [[Glommer's Goop|goop]], which, when eaten, will drop the player's sanity by 50 points at once. Combined with the 50 sanity gain from eating Jelly Salad, this allows the player to quickly manipulate their sanity at will, for example when going to the [[Lunar Island]].

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* Jelly Salad was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Troubled Waters|Troubled Waters]]'' update.
